opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I saw bright red blood on the paper when I wiped, and there is a very itchy, uncomfortable lump right on the outside.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Bright red blood when wiping and a lump at the back passage — I'm anxious it could be serious.

symptom_narrative.character: soft mildly tender lump at the anal verge, itch, bright red blood on wiping
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: blood only on the paper after bowel motions
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling of incomplete emptying; NO severe excruciating pain, no dark tarry stools, no abdominal pain, no weight loss

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; low-fibre diet; very anxious about the bleeding

objective_data_offered.value: bright red blood only on the toilet paper after motions, not dripping into the bowl
soft, mildly tender lump at the anal verge, itchy
